zh.Blackfriars, London, England: 英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Browne於1440年出生在英國素瑞貝華斯時，他的父親Thomas Browne18歲，母親Lady Eleanor Arundel26歲。他於1458年與Elizabeth Paston在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1480年被列為sheriff of kent。他去世於1483年12月4日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年43歲，埋葬在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

zh-hans.Blackfriars, London, England: 英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Browne于1440年出生在英国素瑞貝華斯时，他的父亲Thomas Browne18岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Arundel26岁。他于1458年与Elizabeth Paston在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1480年被列为sheriff of kent。他去世于1483年12月4日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年43岁，埋葬在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Browne was born in 1440, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, his father, Thomas Browne, was 18 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Arundel, was 26. He married Elizabeth Paston in 1458, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1480, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as sheriff of kent. He died on 4 December 1483, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Browne est né en 1440, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Browne, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Arundel, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Paston en 1458, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1480, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kent. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1483, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Browne 1440 in Betchworth, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Browne 18 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor Arundel 26. Er hat 1458 in Paston, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Paston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1480, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of kent aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1483 im Alter von 43 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Browne è nato il nel 1440 nel Betchworth, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Thomas Browne, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor Arundel, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Paston nel 1458, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1480, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kent. Morì il 4 dicembre 1483, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Blackfriars, London, England.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.Paston, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクプアストン
ja.Betchworth, Surrey, England: イギリススリーベトチウオルス
ja.Blackfriars, London, England: イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Browneが1440年にイギリススリーベトチウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Browneは18歳，母Lady Eleanor Arundelは26歳であった。1458年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでElizabeth Pastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1480年，40歳の時，職業はsheriff of kentと記録されている。彼は1483年12月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで43歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Browne(이)가 1440년 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Browne(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Arundel(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1458년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Elizabeth Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1480년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of kent이었다. 그는 1483년 12월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Browne nasceu em 1440, em Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Browne, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Arundel, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Paston em 1458, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1480, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kent. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1483, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Browne родился в 1440 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Browne было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Arundel, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Paston в 1458 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1480 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of kent. Он умер 4 декабря 1483 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия.

sm.Between 1472 and 1473: mai le 1472 e o'o I le 1473

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Browne nació en 1440, en Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Browne, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Arundel, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Paston en 1458, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1480, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kent. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1483, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.
